description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a tan polymer stock and receiver, paired with a black metal barrel and accessory rails. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the handguard includes additional rail segments for tactical attachments. The magazine is a detachable box type, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The stock appears to be fixed and robust, providing stability during firing. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, and the muzzle is fitted with a standard flash hider. The overall construction suggests a blend of polymer and metal materials, typical of contemporary military or law enforcement rifles.
description: A modern tan and black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, full-length Picatinny rail, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. The design combines polymer and metal for durability and ergonomic handling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, full-length Picatinny rail, and black barrel with flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, iron front sight, and the width of the handguard with accessory rails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same tan and black color scheme, fixed stock, and the profile of the magazine and trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's buttplate, the alignment of the Picatinny rail, and the rear iron sight.
